title: Brownfield Access Review Pipeline
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-task-slice.md`, `./access-review-modernization-testing-summary.md`, and `./access-review-modernization-review-findings.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Design the CI/CD pipeline for this reviewed service change, including build, test, staging deployment, rollback, and release-boundary gates. Keep the answer release-safe and concrete.

assertions.name: maps-gates-to-risk
assertions.description: Pipeline stages reflect the reviewed test strategy and known blockers

assertions.name: preserves-brownfield-safety
assertions.description: Rollback, coexistence, and unsupported-flow checks remain explicit delivery gates

assertions.name: stays-delivery-focused
assertions.description: Output remains a pipeline/release automation plan, not a new testing or architecture document

assertions.name: fails-closed
assertions.description: Unsafe releases are blocked before deployment rather than left to production discovery

assertions.name: prepares-downstream-handoff
assertions.description: Output is usable by deployment-strategy and release-management follow-on work

title: Low-Risk Service Pipeline
prompt: Read `./low-risk-service-release.md`, `./low-risk-service-testing-summary.md`, and `./low-risk-service-review-findings.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Design the CI/CD pipeline for this low-risk service release, including build, test, staging deployment, and production release gates. Keep the answer practical and avoid unnecessary rollout theater.

assertions.name: sequences-stages-coherently
assertions.description: Build, test, and deployment stages are ordered sensibly

assertions.name: includes-feedback-fast-gates
assertions.description: Commit / PR checks are included for fast feedback

assertions.name: preserves-staging-verification
assertions.description: Staging verification happens before production release

assertions.name: avoids-overengineering
assertions.description: The pipeline matches the low-risk release without unnecessary high-friction steps

assertions.name: remains-operationally-clear
assertions.description: The result is concrete enough for delivery owners to use directly
